title: keeper-pam-extended.v1 (scaffold)
description: Scaffold-only schema for the keeper-pam-extended family (P14 in docs/V2_DECISIONS.md). No body yet — landing as part of P14 work. Validators MUST reject any manifest that declares this schema with a non-empty body until x-keeper-live-proof.status leaves 'scaffold-only'.

x-keeper-live-proof.notes: Top-level keys planned: gateway_configs, rotation_schedules, discovery_rules, service_mappings, saas_mappings. See docs/V2_DECISIONS.md Q1.
